creator: stasvrn@yandex.ru
text:
The first week I can't update a collection of ports when using any more portsnap.
The command "portsnap update" each time brings a error to the console:
/usr/ports/java/java-checkstyle/
/usr/ports/java/java-cup/
/usr/ports/java/java-getopt/
/usr/ports/java/java-zoneinfo/
files/3604b9743f45f88317257230fbf128ee7df592d1ad6f48f0c68a42bc9faec6d2.gz not found -- snapshot corrupt.

If forcibly to create this file, all the same there is this error.
